sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports left hand pain and difficulty walking. He states the pain is constant and rated 6 out of 10. He also reports a history of a previous ankle fracture.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The examination reveals decreased dorsalis pedis pulse strength. The right ankle shows signs of previous fracture healing. The patient's gait is antalgic.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The primary problem is a lateral malleolar fracture with associated pain and impaired mobility. Risk factors include history of previous fracture.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order weight-bearing x-rays of the right ankle. Recommend crutches for ambulation. Schedule follow-up with orthopedics in one week.
